import subprocess,hashlib,os,json
scratch=r'C:/Users/daish/v3-baseline-scratch/v3-arm-b-run-1-owner'

st=subprocess.run(['git','-C',scratch,'status','--short'],capture_output=True,text=True,check=True).stdout.strip()
assert st=='', st
for hk in ('pre-commit','pre-push','ai-governance-framework-root'):
    assert os.path.exists(os.path.join(scratch,'.git','hooks',hk)), hk
v=subprocess.run(['./.venv/Scripts/python.exe','governance_tools/hook_install_validator.py','--repo',scratch,'--framework-root','.','--format','json'],capture_output=True,text=True)
assert json.loads(v.stdout)['valid'] is True
L=open('artifacts/evidence/test-results/launcher-no-governance-baseline-v3-b1-owner-20260711.ps1',encoding='utf-8').read()
assert 'project_doc_max_bytes' not in L and 'v3-arm-b-run-1-owner' in L and 'gpt-5.6-terra' in L and 'PreventBreakaway' in L and '26.707.3748.0' in L
for sfx in ('jsonl','stderr.txt','result.json'):
    assert not os.path.exists(f'artifacts/evidence/test-results/raw-no-governance-baseline-v3-b1-20260711.{sfx}')
print('B1: seed anchors, hooks installed+valid, treatment flags correct, outputs absent, api_call_performed=false')
"
